morning.verse: They are new every morning; great is your faithfulness.

evening.verse: In peace I will lie down and sleep.

morning.verse: This is the day the Lord has made; let us rejoice.

evening.verse: Cast all your anxiety on him because he cares for you.

morning.verse: Be strong and courageous. Do not be afraid.

evening.verse: Give thanks in all circumstances.

morning.verse: I can do all this through him who gives me strength.

evening.verse: Be still, and know that I am God.

morning.verse: The Lord is my light and my salvation—whom shall I fear?

evening.verse: Peace I leave with you; my peace I give you.

morning.verse: Trust in the Lord with all your heart.

evening.verse: The Lord will keep you from all harm.

morning.verse: Arise, shine, for your light has come.

evening.verse: Come to me, I will give you rest.

morning.verse: The Lord is my strength and my shield.

evening.verse: Do not be anxious about tomorrow.

morning.verse: My help comes from the Lord.

evening.verse: You will keep in perfect peace.

morning.verse: Rejoice in the Lord always.

evening.verse: And the peace of God will guard your hearts.

morning.verse: The Lord will fight for you; be still.

evening.verse: Pour out your hearts to God.

morning.verse: I know the plans I have for you, says the Lord.

evening.verse: He will never leave you nor forsake you.

morning.verse: Come to me, all you who are weary.

evening.verse: I will praise you, Lord, for you have rescued me.

morning.verse: The joy of the Lord is your strength.

evening.verse: The Lord is good to those who wait for him.

morning.verse: I will go before you and level the mountains.

evening.verse: I will bless the Lord at all times.

morning.verse: My grace is sufficient for you.

evening.verse: The Lord is near to all who call on him.

morning.verse: The Lord is good, a refuge in times of trouble.

evening.verse: Let the peace of Christ rule in your hearts.

morning.verse: Let your light shine before others.

evening.verse: I will give you rest.

morning.verse: I will walk in freedom.

evening.verse: The Lord is my refuge and my fortress.

morning.verse: The Lord is my shepherd, I lack nothing.

evening.verse: Do not be afraid, for I am with you.

morning.verse: Do not be anxious about anything.

evening.verse: I will tell of all your wonderful deeds.

morning.verse: In me you may have peace.

evening.verse: The Lord is my shepherd; I shall not want.

morning.verse: Love the Lord your God with all your heart.

evening.verse: I will fear no evil.

morning.verse: The Lord is faithful, he will strengthen you.

evening.verse: Surely your goodness and love will follow me.

morning.verse: I will praise you, Lord, with all my heart.

evening.verse: The Lord is faithful to all his promises.

morning.verse: Under his wings you will find refuge.

evening.verse: I will sleep and wake again, the Lord sustains me.

morning.verse: The Lord is my helper; I will not be afraid.

evening.verse: For God so loved the world.

morning.verse: Let us run with perseverance the race marked out for us.

evening.verse: I will lie down in peace and sleep.

morning.verse: Your word is a lamp for my feet.

evening.verse: I will trust in you alone, O Lord.

morning.verse: I am with you wherever you go.

evening.verse: Thank you for your love that never fails.
